subject: [PATCH v4 0/5] mm: zone lock tracepoint instrumentation

reviews.author: Dmitry Ilvokhin
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the performance impact of a generic release-side tracepoint and suggested an alternative solution using zone lock wrappers.

2026-03-16.patch_summary: The thread discusses the limitations of a generic release-side tracepoint for spin locks and proposes an alternative solution using zone lock wrappers.
